scenario.name: Cisco VQ NOTIFY (Partial Report)
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:user@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport][local_ip_type] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: user <sip:user@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Event: vq-rtcpxr Subscription-State: terminated Content-Type: application/vq-rtcpxr User-Agent: Cisco-CP-8845/12.0.1 Content-Length: [len]
VQSessionReport: CallTerm CallID: [call_id]@[local_ip] LocalID: sip:user1@[local_ip] RemoteID: sip:user2@[remote_ip] MOSLQ=4.1 RLQ=85.0
